/**

 * @return {number}

function solve(nums) {
    // Step 1: Find the set S of unique values in nums for O(1) lookup
    const S = new Set(nums);
    
    let totalSum = 0;
    
    // Step 2: Calculate the minimum replacement value for each element and sum them up.
    for (const x of nums) {
        let min_d = x; // Initialize with x, as x always divides x and x is in S
        
        // Find all divisors of x
        const limit = Math.floor(Math.sqrt(x));
        
        for (let i = 1; i <= limit; i++) {
            if (x % i === 0) {
                // i is a divisor
                const d1 = i;
                // x/i is a divisor
                const d2 = x / i;
                
                // Check d1
                if (S.has(d1)) {
                    if (d1 < min_d) {
                        min_d = d1;
                    }
                }
                
                // Check d2 (only if d2 != d1, which happens if x is not a perfect square of i)
                if (d1 !== d2) {
                    if (S.has(d2)) {
                        if (d2 < min_d) {
                            min_d = d2;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        totalSum += min_d;
    }
    
    return totalSum;
}
